title: Brutality Craft
description: Brutality is a extreme hardcore survival modpack
body:
Brutality is a extreme hardcore survival forge modpack that make minecraft a lot harder and very Brutal. Hardcore is extremely brutal in this modpack if you wear the cursed ring.
Addional info about the curse ring: 
The Cursed Ring is a ring that you can equip in the world that makes the game harder but also gives some benefits



![Taverne](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FjndvI8K/images/3fe0bb2b166192c7877d70c5342de058a8db0bf5.png)





__________________________________________________________________________________________________
    Some of the features of the modpack

    Thirst and Heat system
    Shader Support
    Includes Voice Chat
    
    Progressive difficulty using Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty
